mapper.select: select * from workflow_definitions where flow_type = #{flowType} and is_active = 1 order by version desc limit 1
select * from workflow_nodes where workflow_definition_id = #{definitionId} order by node_order asc

select i.*, su.name as started_by_name, fu.name as finished_by_name from case_workflow_instances i left join users su on su.id = i.started_by left join users fu on fu.id = i.finished_by where i.id = #{instanceId}

select i.*, su.name as started_by_name, fu.name as finished_by_name from case_workflow_instances i left join users su on su.id = i.started_by left join users fu on fu.id = i.finished_by where i.case_id = #{caseId} order by i.id desc

select i.*, su.name as started_by_name, fu.name as finished_by_name from case_workflow_instances i left join users su on su.id = i.started_by left join users fu on fu.id = i.finished_by where i.case_id = #{caseId} and i.flow_type = #{flowType} and i.status = 'PENDING' order by i.id desc limit 1

select t.*, wn.node_name, u.name as acted_by_name, i.case_id, c.case_number, i.flow_type from case_workflow_tasks t inner join case_workflow_instances i on i.id = t.instance_id inner join cases c on c.id = i.case_id left join workflow_nodes wn on wn.workflow_definition_id = ( select wd.id from workflow_definitions wd where wd.flow_type = i.flow_type and wd.version = i.flow_version limit 1 ) and wn.node_key = t.node_key left join users u on u.id = t.acted_by where t.id = #{taskId} and t.status = 'TODO'

select t.*, wn.node_name, u.name as acted_by_name, i.case_id, c.case_number, i.flow_type from case_workflow_tasks t inner join case_workflow_instances i on i.id = t.instance_id inner join cases c on c.id = i.case_id left join workflow_nodes wn on wn.workflow_definition_id = ( select wd.id from workflow_definitions wd where wd.flow_type = i.flow_type and wd.version = i.flow_version limit 1 ) and wn.node_key = t.node_key left join users u on u.id = t.acted_by where t.status = 'TODO' and i.case_id = #{caseId} and i.flow_type = #{flowType} and t.assignee_role = #{roleCode} order by t.id asc limit 1

select t.*, wn.node_name, u.name as acted_by_name, i.case_id, c.case_number, i.flow_type from case_workflow_tasks t inner join case_workflow_instances i on i.id = t.instance_id inner join cases c on c.id = i.case_id left join workflow_nodes wn on wn.workflow_definition_id = ( select wd.id from workflow_definitions wd where wd.flow_type = i.flow_type and wd.version = i.flow_version limit 1 ) and wn.node_key = t.node_key left join users u on u.id = t.acted_by where t.status = 'TODO' and i.case_id = #{caseId} and i.flow_type = #{flowType} order by t.id asc limit 1

select t.*, wn.node_name, u.name as acted_by_name, i.case_id, c.case_number, i.flow_type from case_workflow_tasks t inner join case_workflow_instances i on i.id = t.instance_id inner join cases c on c.id = i.case_id left join workflow_nodes wn on wn.workflow_definition_id = ( select wd.id from workflow_definitions wd where wd.flow_type = i.flow_type and wd.version = i.flow_version limit 1 ) and wn.node_key = t.node_key left join users u on u.id = t.acted_by where t.instance_id = #{instanceId} order by t.id asc

select t.*, wn.node_name, i.case_id, c.case_number, i.flow_type from case_workflow_tasks t inner join case_workflow_instances i on i.id = t.instance_id inner join cases c on c.id = i.case_id left join workflow_nodes wn on wn.workflow_definition_id = ( select wd.id from workflow_definitions wd where wd.flow_type = i.flow_type and wd.version = i.flow_version limit 1 ) and wn.node_key = t.node_key where t.status = 'TODO' and t.assignee_role = #{roleCode} order by t.id desc
mapper.update: update case_workflow_tasks set status = #{status}, comment = #{comment}, acted_by = #{actedBy}, acted_at = #{actedAt} where id = #{taskId} and status = 'TODO'
update case_workflow_tasks set status = #{status}, comment = #{comment}, acted_by = #{actedBy}, acted_at = #{actedAt} where instance_id = #{instanceId} and status = 'TODO'
mapper.select: select * from case_workflow_action_logs where request_id = #{requestId} limit 1
